title: boronia hirsuta
intro: Boronia hirsuta, also known as the hairy boronia or hairy boron, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Boronia hirsuta are believed to include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. It can be prepared as an herbal infusion, oil, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne.
